channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Chris Sale and Tarik Skubal take Cy Young Awards after both were pitching triple crown winners
item.description: Chris Sale was one of the ace left-handers Tarik Skubal idolized as a teenager. Now the two will be linked forever after winning their first Cy Young Awards on Wednesday. Skubal was a unanimous pick for the American League honor following a brilliant season with the Detroit Tigers.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: MLB will test robot umpires at 13 spring training ballparks hosting 19 teams
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Major League Baseball will test robot umpires as part of a challenge system during spring training at 13 ballparks hosting 19 teams, which could lead to regular-season use in 2026.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Manfred says Tampa area politicians will be given time to sort out Rays' ballpark situation
item.description: Tampa area politicians will be given time to sort out the Rays’ ballpark situation following Hurricane Milton, and baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred said there has been no thought to allowing the team to explore a relocation.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Las Vegas Grand Prix in better shape after ironing out inaugural year kinks that nearly ruined race
item.description: There’s never been a faster 180-degree turn than the one Max Verstappen took a year ago at the inaugural Las Vegas Grand Prix.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: LPGA Tour sets another record with $127.5M in prize money for 2025
item.description: The LPGA Tour will play for $127.5 million in official prize money in 2025, another record for the circuit that has worked independently of the PGA Tour for 75 years.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jasmine Paolini and Italy beat Slovakia to win the Billie Jean King Cup
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Two-time Grand Slam finalist Jasmine Paolini capped a breakthrough season by leading Italy to its first Billie Jean King Cup title since 2013 on Wednesday, defeating Rebecca Sramkova 6-2, 6-1 to seal a 2-0 victory over Slovakia in the final of the women’s team competition.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Capitals put Alex Ovechkin on injured reserve, ruling him out at least a week
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — Alex Ovechkin is on injured reserve, and the Washington Capitals are coming to grips with playing without their superstar captain for the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mexico overcomes 2-goal deficit, reaches CONCACAF Nations League semifinals with US, Canada, Panama
item.description: Mexico overcame a two-goal, first-leg deficit and reached the CONCACAF Nations League semifinals with a 4-0 win over Honduras at Toluca on Tuesday night behind two goals from Henry Martín and one each from Raúl Jiménez and Jorge Sánchez.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brayden Point's OT winner helps Lightning rally past Penguins, 3-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored at 3:58 of overtime and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Pittsburgh Penguins 3-2 on Tuesday night. Point’s overtime winner was his 10th goal of the season. Anthony Cirelli scored his fifth goal of the season. Andrei Vasilevskiy stopped 17 shots for Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Connor Bedard trying to break out of slump as the Blackhawks struggle to score
item.description: Bedard was terrific last season, living up to the considerable hype that has followed him around for years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: USU seeks to overturn loss in forfeited volleyball game against San Jose State
item.description: Just hours after Utah lawmakers urged Utah State University to join a Title IX lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference, the Logan-based school filed a motion to join the lawsuit, in part.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Zach LaVine's 16 fourth-quarter points lead Bulls past Pistons 122-112
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 16 of his 25 points in the fourth quarter and the Chicago Bulls pulled away for a 122-112 win against the Detroit Pistons on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls great Bob Love dead at 81 after battle with cancer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — An all-star for the Chicago Bulls in the 1970's, franchise great Bob Love has died at the age of 81 after a long battle with cancer, the team announced Monday. Love played from 1968 to 1976 with the Chicago Bulls and was affectionately nicknamed "Butterbean" for his kind demeanor.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump dance takes over sports world
item.description: Supporters of President-elect Donald Trump have been paying homage on the gridiron and inside the octagon in recent days.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Ex-NFL star Jason Brown left football to fight food insecurity
item.description: Jason Brown left the NFL in 2012 at the age of 29 in order to pursue a greater goal that God had in store for him.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz comeback falls short against Clippers, 116-105
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - James Harden moved into second place on the NBA's career 3-point list and had 20 points and 11 assists to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 116-105 on Sunday night to end a three-game losing streak. Harden moved past Ray Allen with No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Triathlete with terminal cancer completes Ironman championship
item.description: An Ironman is a test of endurance featuring a 2.4-mile swim, a 26.2-mile marathon run, and a 112-mile bike ride.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Kris Byrant's Lamborghini Huracan stolen from Colorado home
item.description: Kris Bryant's Lamborghini Huracan was stolen by a multi-state vehicle theft ring, but was recovered by police in Las Vegas after they traced the stolen vehicle to a home in the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers fall after late TD pushes Seahawks past San Francisco 20-17
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Geno Smith scored on a 13-yard scramble with 12 seconds remaining and the Seattle Seahawks snapped a six-game losing streak against the San Francisco 49ers with a 20-17 victory on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Mountain West Conference determines there's insufficient evidence in volleyball Title IX complaint
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The Mountain West Conference has concluded there was insufficient evidence to determine misconduct between women's volleyball players from the Colorado State and San Jose State programs ahead of a match last month after a coach filed a Title IX complaint alleging the student-ath
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Netflix experiences streaming delays leading up to Tyson-Paul fight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Netflix's first attempt at handling a live sports event did not receive a passing grade. The fight Friday night between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul experienced streaming problems according to many viewers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bird, Fowles, Pondexter, Beard headline Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025
item.description: WNBA greats Sue Bird, Sylvia Fowles, Cappie Pondexter and Alana Beard headline the Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025 that was announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Olympic champion Lindsey Vonn is ending her retirement at age 40 to make a skiing comeback
item.description: Vonn's last competition came in February 2019, after she dealt with a long series of injuries throughout her career.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
